title: Sanctuary Floor Renovation Complete
content: After months of planning and generous donations, the new hardwood floor in the sanctuary is installed and beautiful. Thank you to everyone who volunteered and contributed.
excerpt: New sanctuary floor installed — read the full story.

title: Building Committee October Meeting Notes
content: The October 3rd meeting covered fall maintenance priorities, the remaining items on the 2025 capital plan, and early planning for the 40th anniversary celebration in 2026.
excerpt: Summary of the Oct 3 building committee meeting.

title: Veterans Day Ceremony at the Biloxi VFW
content: Several members of our congregation joined Brother John Baker and other veterans at the annual Veterans Day ceremony at Biloxi VFW Post 3905. We honor all who have served.
excerpt: Church members join Veterans Day ceremony.

title: Painting Day Recap – Fellowship Hall
content: Over 15 volunteers showed up on a Saturday morning in November to repaint the fellowship hall. Brother Baker hauled supplies in his truck from Lowe's on Pass Road. The hall looks brand new.
excerpt: Recap of the November fellowship hall painting day.

title: 40th Anniversary Celebration – Announcing October 11, 2026
content: Shiloh Baptist Church will celebrate its 40th anniversary on Sunday October 11, 2026. Save the date! Registration and details to follow in the coming months.

title: Sermon Recap – The God Who Provides
content: In his June 7 message, Pastor Wilkins drew from Genesis 22 to remind us that God sees our needs before we speak them. Full audio available in the Sermons section.
excerpt: Pastor Wilkins on Genesis 22 — God's provision.

title: Choir Spring Concert – A Night of Praise
content: Our Shiloh Baptist Choir delivered a beautiful evening of gospel music on May 24. Thank you to Director Renee Chavis and every voice that filled the sanctuary.

title: Building Committee May Meeting Summary
content: The November 2026 meeting confirmed the parking lot resurfacing is complete. The committee voted to begin soliciting bids for a roof inspection before fall.

title: Outreach Report – Spring Food Pantry Drive
content: The church collected 420 pounds of non-perishable food items during our spring food pantry drive. Thanks to all who donated. Deliveries were made to the Salvation Army and Grace Community Center.

title: Anniversary Registration Is Now Open
content: Registration for the 40th Anniversary Celebration on October 11, 2026 is now open. Sign up at shilohbaptistbiloxi.org/anniversary or pick up a form from Gloria in the church office.
excerpt: Register now for the Oct 11 anniversary celebration.

title: Painting Day Coming November 7 – Volunteers Needed
content: The Building Committee has scheduled a Painting Day for Saturday November 7. We need volunteers to help refresh the sanctuary walls. Sign up with Lamar Boykin or on the church website.
excerpt: Volunteer for the November 7 painting day.

title: Sermon – Walking in Faith
content: Pastor Wilkins preached from Hebrews 11 on June 1, lifting up the faith of the saints who walked before us. A powerful reminder that faith is action, not just belief.

title: Youth Ministry Summer Program Registration
content: The Shiloh Baptist Youth Summer Program runs June 20 through July 25. Register your children ages 6-17 at the church office or online. Space is limited.

title: Remembering Sister Mattie Johnson
content: Our congregation mourns the passing of Sister Mattie Johnson, a founding member of Shiloh Baptist Church. A homegoing celebration was held on May 30. She will be greatly missed.

title: Nehemiah and the Work of Restoration – Sermon Series Begins
content: This May, Pastor Wilkins began a four-part sermon series on the book of Nehemiah. The series focuses on community, leadership, and the call to rebuild what is broken.

title: New Website Launched on Webflow
content: After several months of design and development work, our new church website is live. Thanks to Calvin Hargrove for building it and the committee for their feedback during the process.

title: Women's Ministry Spring Luncheon Recap
content: The Women's Ministry spring luncheon was a wonderful afternoon of fellowship, food, and a devotional by Sister Ruth Ann Sigler. Thank you to all who attended and helped set up.

title: Draft: Veterans Day 2026 – Ceremony Planning
content: Planning notes for the November 11, 2026 Veterans Day ceremony. John Baker is coordinating with the Biloxi VFW. Details TBD.
excerpt: Draft planning post for Veterans Day 2026.

title: Prayer Focus – December 2026
content: This month we are praying for the families of those we have lost, for our youth as summer begins, and for wisdom as the building committee evaluates the roof repair. Join us Wednesday evenings at 6:30.
excerpt: June prayer focus from Pastor Wilkins.

title: Building Committee December Meeting – Mark Your Calendars
content: The December 5 building committee meeting is scheduled. Agenda will include the 2027 capital plan and holiday volunteer coordination. All committee members should plan to attend.

title: Thanksgiving 2026 – Giving Thanks Together
content: We give thanks for another year of God's faithfulness. The church office will be closed November 26-28. The building committee meeting on November 7 will proceed as scheduled.
